name: playwright_cucumber
description: Playwright + Cucumber JavaScript automation framework for automationexercise.com

scripts.test:chrome:smoke: cross-env BROWSER=chrome PACK_NAME=smoke TAGS=@smoke node utils/runCucumber.js
scripts.test:firefox:smoke: cross-env BROWSER=firefox PACK_NAME=smoke TAGS=@smoke node utils/runCucumber.js
scripts.test:safari:smoke: cross-env BROWSER=safari PACK_NAME=smoke TAGS=@smoke node utils/runCucumber.js
scripts.test:chrome:sanity: cross-env BROWSER=chrome PACK_NAME=sanity TAGS=@sanity node utils/runCucumber.js
scripts.test:firefox:sanity: cross-env BROWSER=firefox PACK_NAME=sanity TAGS=@sanity node utils/runCucumber.js
scripts.test:safari:sanity: cross-env BROWSER=safari PACK_NAME=sanity TAGS=@sanity node utils/runCucumber.js
scripts.test:all: npm run clean:reports && npm run test:chrome && npm run test:firefox && npm run test:safari && npm run report:html
scripts.test:all:parallel: npm run clean:reports && concurrently -k -s first -n chrome,firefox,safari "npm run test:chrome" "npm run test:firefox" "npm run test:safari" && npm run report:html
scripts.test:pack:smoke: npm run clean:reports && npm run test:chrome:smoke && npm run test:firefox:smoke && npm run test:safari:smoke && npm run report:html
scripts.test:pack:sanity: npm run clean:reports && npm run test:chrome:sanity && npm run test:firefox:sanity && npm run test:safari:sanity && npm run report:html
scripts.test:pack:full-regression: npm run clean:reports && npm run test:all
scripts.test:ci: npm run clean && npm run test:all
